basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) & Senior Research Fellow (SRF)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Roorkee is recruiting JRF (02) and SRF (01) positions. Interview will be conducted online for shortlisted candidates.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates (Online)

qualification.details: JRF: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA + Medical SRF: Rs. 42,000 per month + HRA + Medical
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in ECE/EEE/EIE + GATE/NET or M.E./M.Tech in ECE/VLSI with GATE/NET

vacancy_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): 02 Posts Senior Research Fellow (SRF): 01 Post

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Online Interview. Candidates must submit application through email and Google Form. Original documents will be verified at the time of interview.
how_to_apply: Fill the application on plain paper with detailed CV.
Submit through: Email: [email protected] Google Form: https://forms.gle/suHer5e499popToY7
Attach application, CV, experience details, and attested copies of certificates.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the online interview.
important_instructions: Selected candidates may get opportunity for PhD admission. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates with equal qualifications. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project.

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee JRF/SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee invites applications from Indian nationals for project positions under the consultancy/research project titled “Design of 100+ Gbps Optical Transceivers for Onboard and Inter-Satellite Communication” led by Prof. Darshak Bhatt. Download Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee JRF/SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee JRF/SRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Roorkee is recruiting JRF (02) and SRF (01) positions. Interview will be conducted online for shortlisted candidates.

content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): 02 Posts Senior Research Fellow (SRF): 01 Post

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA + Medical SRF: Rs. 42,000 per month + HRA + Medical

rows.details: B.E./B.Tech in ECE/EEE/EIE + GATE/NET or M.E./M.Tech in ECE/VLSI with GATE/NET
Same as JRF + minimum 2 years research/industry experience
Experience with Cadence Virtuoso, ADS, foundry PDKs, analog/mixed-signal design, EM simulation tools

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Online Interview. Candidates must submit application through email and Google Form. Original documents will be verified at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the application on plain paper with detailed CV. Submit through: Email: [email protected] Google Form: https://forms.gle/suHer5e499popToY7 Attach application, CV, experience details, and attested copies of certificates. Last date: 14 July 2026, 11:59 PM. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the online interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions forIndian Institute of Technology Roorkee Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Selected candidates may get opportunity for PhD admission. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates with equal qualifications. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Roorkee JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for JRF and SRF at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: JRF: Rs. 37,000 + HRA + Medical; SRF: Rs. 42,000 + HRA + Medical.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in IIT Roorkee Optical Transceiver project?
faq.answer: JRF – 02 posts and SRF – 01 post.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for IIT Roorkee JRF position?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in ECE/EEE with GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE score mandatory for IIT Roorkee JRF/SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, GATE/NET qualification is required.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Roorkee JRF/SRF 2026?
faq.answer: Submit application through email to [email protected] and the Google Form link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the project at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The project duration is 3 years.

faq.question: Q8. Is PhD opportunity available for selected candidates at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates may get an opportunity for PhD admission.

faq.question: Q9. What skills are required for IIT Roorkee Optical Transceiver project?
faq.answer: Experience in Cadence Virtuoso, ADS, analog/mixed-signal design, and EM simulation tools.

faq.question: Q10. Is the IIT Roorkee JRF/SRF position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project position for 3 years.
